name: Honey Lemon Rosemary Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse chicken in cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
3. Spray an 11x15x1-inch baking pan with cooking spray.
4. Place chicken in the pan.
5. Combine honey, lemon juice, rosemary, and crushed red pepper in a small bowl.
6. Brush half of the sauce over the chicken.
7. Bake chicken at 350°F for 1 hour or until done, brushing occasionally with remaining sauce.
